label: Client Registration
description: Client creates account and configures credentials on the Onboarda portal.
validation_required: Verify client portal user creation with strong password rules (12+ chars, special char check)
Test Bearer JWT token generation, cookie security, and local storage storage flows
Confirm auth logs record accurate client timestamps, IP addresses, and User-Agents
plain_english_explanation: The starting point where an applicant creates their credentials securely. If this fails, no new clients can access the platform.

label: Application / Prescreening
description: Client submits initial corporate structure, expected volumes, and jurisdiction info.
validation_required: Verify client session draft 'Save & Resume' state persistence across browser reboots
Verify server validation blocks incomplete shareholder structure percentage calculations
Confirm prescreening data is stored correctly in the JSONB database column
plain_english_explanation: Collects crucial company details and corporate structural charts. Gaps here cause incorrect downstream risk calculations.

label: Risk Scoring
description: Deterministic D1-D5 composite risk calculation with non-overridable floor rules.
validation_required: Test D1-D5 composite scoring calculations against reference Excel spreadsheet templates
Verify FATF grey and black list country matches instantly trigger non-overridable VERY_HIGH floors
Test automatic risk recomputation trigger when company sector or ownership fields change
plain_english_explanation: Executes standard scoring logic to classify applicant risk (Low to Very High). Errors here bypass mandatory compliance gates.

label: Pricing Review
description: Internal officer review of client parameters to finalize onboarding quote.
validation_required: Verify application status transitions from 'pricing_review' to 'pricing_accepted' on user accept
Confirm back-office dashboard logs pricing approvals under the corresponding officer ID
plain_english_explanation: Determines the financial terms of the client contract before formal KYC document upload requests are sent.

label: Pre-Approval
description: Officer review and approval gate for high-risk applications before document upload.
validation_required: Test pre-approval dual-control locks: require administrative roles for High/Very High cases
Verify audit logs record the documented pre-approval decision, officer ID, and timestamps
plain_english_explanation: Acts as an early compliance gateway to halt high-risk applicants before investing operational effort in expensive document checks.

label: KYC Documents
description: Client uploads entity (Section A), shareholder (Section B), and business (Section C) papers.
validation_required: Test file format validators: block spoofed MIME files and allow only verified PDFs/Images
Test file size caps: block uploads larger than the 25MB safety limit
Verify documents are written to the correct AWS S3 environment bucket (demo vs staging)
plain_english_explanation: The intake pipeline where applicants upload proof of incorporation, passports, and utility bills. Blocks invalid file extensions.

label: Screening
description: Sanctions, PEP, and adverse media screening checks executed via provider API.
validation_required: Verify production blocks mock/simulated screening, enforcing real Sumsub API calls
Test screening freshness: block application approval if inputs changed after last screening run
Confirm PEP and sanctions hits populate in the screening review queue for manual disposition
plain_english_explanation: Scans individuals and entities against global lists for criminal activity or political exposure. Failures here expose the firm to heavy fines.

label: Document Verification
description: Automated 5-layer document verification (gate, rule, hybrid, and Claude AI checks).
validation_required: Verify document status changes to 'flagged' if any automated name or authenticity checks fail
Verify senior officer override gate: allow flagged documents only with documented reason and admin role
Test document duplication checker: calculate SHA-256 hash on file upload to block duplicates
plain_english_explanation: Runs OCR and Claude Vision checks to confirm passport validity, expiration dates, and stamp details. Flags tampered or blurry uploads.

label: Compliance Memo
description: Compiles a structured 11-section compliance memo for officer review.
validation_required: Test pre-generation rule block: refuse memo generation if sanctions or risk scores are pending
Verify WeasyPrint PDF compilation output: must execute asynchronously to prevent Tornado blocking
Verify generated PDF files include an immutable SHA-256 hash in database headers to block tampering
plain_english_explanation: Automates the writing of a complete 11-section compliance rationale. Eliminates 2-4 hours of manual word-processing.

label: Validation Engine
description: Deterministic 15-rule quality audit evaluating compliance memo structure and facts.
validation_required: Verify validation returns a quality score (0-10) and correct status (pass / pass_with_fixes / fail)
Confirm pass_with_fixes status blocks application approval unless senior admin overrides with reason
plain_english_explanation: Performs an automated quality assurance check on the generated memo, highlighting contradictions or unproven claims.

label: Supervisor Review
description: Deterministic 11-check AI-output contradiction detection and gate review.
validation_required: Verify supervisor blocks approval (can_approve = False) if risk scoring diverges from decisions
Test supervisor warning bypass: require senior officer roles and documented overrides
plain_english_explanation: Cross-references automated AI checks against raw database findings. Ensures the AI and the database tell the exact same story.

label: EDD Routing
description: Routes High/Very High risk applicants into Enhanced Due Diligence queue.
validation_required: Verify EDD cases transition cleanly through all 6 operational stages (triggered to edd_approved)
Test EDD completion gate: block final application approval unless all active EDD triggers are satisfied
plain_english_explanation: An intensive compliance lane for complex clients, requiring additional documentation and dual-officer sign-offs.

label: Officer Decision
description: Enforces a 9-point approval gate validator before final application sign-off.
validation_required: Test all 9 sequential ApprovalGateValidator gates in security_hardening.py
Verify server-side capture of signing officer's IP address, User-Agent, and role permissions
plain_english_explanation: The ultimate approval point. Run through a fail-closed 9-point checklist to block any compliance oversights.

label: Audit Trail
description: Cryptographically chained log entries tracking all supervisor actions and decisions.
validation_required: Test SHA-256 cryptographic chain: verify a database edit breaks the hash validation
Verify GDPR purge events write to immutable logs and remove target PII columns
Confirm authorization denials log IP address, role, and query parameters to the audit log
plain_english_explanation: An immutable, blockchain-like log that proves to external regulators that no compliance records have been manipulated.

label: Ongoing Monitoring
description: Continuous monitoring alerts, periodic reviews, and risk drift tracking.
validation_required: Verify ongoing monitoring alerts trigger correctly on transaction anomalies or geographic drift
Verify periodic review schedules update correctly based on client risk levels (e.g. 1 year vs 3 months)
plain_english_explanation: Keeps the client under active review after onboarding. Alerts officers to subsequent transactional or media changes.
